title: Faithful Expansion
body:
I am so sorry!

Currently I can't develop a resource pack because my laptop is dead... I will definitely continue working as soon as I can buy a new one, repair an old laptop is already useless.

Faithful Expansion is an independent add-on for Faithful x32 that expands its functionality. The main task of the resource pack is to support mods for Fabric, but there are also other functions. The list of included content is below:

  • Thick Unicode fonts
  • 2D bed icons
  • 2D torch icons
  • Fabric API support
  • Cloth Config support
  • Apple Skin support
  • Better Advancements support
  • WTHIT support
  • Mod Menu support

Also, please note that this resource pack will not support OptiFine and mods for Forge!

Don't forget that in order for Faithful Expansion to work correctly in the list of resource packs, it needs to be moved above Faithful x32 and Fabric Mods, as shown below:
